name: Baichuan AI
description: Baichuan 4 flagship model with enhanced reasoning, math, and coding abilities. Improved 10%+ in general tasks, 14% in math, 9% in coding. Includes medical model M3 Plus.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Baichuan AI (百川智能) provides Baichuan 4 flagship model with significant improvements in general ability (+10%), mathematics (+14%), and coding (+9%) compared to Baichuan 3. Includes specialized medical model M3 Plus with low hallucination rates. Four APIs available: Baichuan 4, Baichuan3-Turbo, Baichuan3-Turbo-128k, and Assistant API. **Note:** Requires API key from [Baichuan Developer Center](https://platform.baichuan-ai.com/).

Authorization.description: Bearer token for Baichuan AI API authentication

tools.name: Create Chat Completion
tools.description: Generate conversational responses using Baichuan models

messages.description: Array of message objects with 'role' and 'content' fields

tools.name: Create Embeddings
tools.description: Create vector embeddings for text using Baichuan embedding models

input.description: Text or array of texts to create embeddings for

tools.name: Medical Consultation (M3 Plus)
tools.description: Use specialized medical model M3 Plus for healthcare queries

temperature.description: Lower temperature recommended for medical queries (0.1-0.3)

tools.name: List Available Models
tools.description: Get list of all available Baichuan models
